displayTitle: Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith #5: Sith Secrets
synopsis:
Imprisoned in Cinnagar's Iron Citadel, Ulic Qel-Droma is tortured as a suspected Jedi spy by the jealous Satal Keto. When Ulic insists he has come to learn the dark side, Satal injects him with a Sith poison, and the infatuated Aleema nurses him back to health, hoping to turn him into an ally. On Yavin 4, Exar Kun sets the Massassi to building Sith temples and discovers Naga Sadow's ancient battleship and alchemy laboratory hidden beneath the Temple of Fire.

Seeking proof that Ulic still lives, Nomi Sunrider lets herself be captured by the Krath while Cay Qel-Droma and Tott Doneeta wait aboard the *Nebulon Ranger*. To prove his loyalty, Ulic must execute her, but he secretly plans her rescue and sends word to Ossus revealing the Ketos as the ones behind Arca Jeth's death. Satal intercepts the message and orders both Nomi's execution and Ulic's assassination. Nomi's battle meditation turns the guards against one another, and in a duel Ulic strikes down Satal to avenge his master, giving in to the anger that ignites the Sith poison in his veins. He drives Cay and Tott away with the Force, and the heartbroken Jedi flee into hyperspace as Nomi grieves his apparent fall.
title: Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith #5: Sith Secrets
